stem: My grandfather is not ___ old to learn Italian.
explanation: 考点:too...to 结构。too old to do 表示“太老而不能做”；此处在否定句中强调“并不太老而不能学”。

stem: He is patient enough ___ every day.
explanation: 考点:enough...to。形容词/副词 + enough 后接 to do，故选 to practice。

stem: The sentence was ___ long to remember at once.
explanation: 考点:too...to。too long to remember 表示“太长而记不住”，语义完整。

stem: He has ___ courage to speak with native speakers.
explanation: 考点:enough 用法。修饰名词 courage 时用 enough 放在名词前，表达“足够的勇气”。

stem: He is old, but he is still young ___ (enough) to begin again.
explanation: 考点:enough...to。young enough to begin 表示“足够年轻可以开始”。

stem: Tourists ___ photos when the speedboat lost control.
explanation: 考点:过去进行时。when 引导突发动作前的背景，应用 were taking。

stem: The driver suddenly ___ control near the bridge.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。suddenly 提示突发且已完成动作，应选 lost。

stem: Police ___ the river from the bridge at that moment.
explanation: 考点:过去进行时。at that moment 表示过去某时正在进行，选 were watching。

stem: Rescue boats ___ a few minutes later.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。a few minutes later 是过去时间线，应用 arrived。

stem: The boat ___ (shake) violently when people shouted.
explanation: 考点:过去进行时。与 when people shouted 搭配，背景动作用 was shaking。

stem: By the time police questioned him, he ___ his ticket.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。保留票据发生在 questioned 之前，应用 had kept。

stem: He said that he ___ at the theatre that night.
explanation: 考点:间接引语。主句 said 为过去时，转述中 am/is 要后移为 was。

stem: The play ___ before the robbery was reported.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。演出开始在 reported 之前，应用 had started。

stem: The usher told the police that the man ___ in Row B.
explanation: 考点:间接引语+过去完成时。转述过去更早动作时，用 had sat。

stem: By midnight, witnesses ___ (confirm) his story.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。by midnight 表示过去参照点前已完成，填 had confirmed。

stem: The boys ___ by fallen rocks for hours.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时被动。强调“在救援到来前已被困”，应选 had been trapped。

stem: A narrow passage ___ by engineers during the operation.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动。passage 是受动者，且动作发生在过去，选 was opened。

stem: By the time help arrived, the main tunnel ___.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。坍塌先于 arrived，应用 had collapsed。

stem: Heavy equipment ___ into the mine carefully.
explanation: 考点:被动语态。equipment 是被运送对象，过去情境用 was carried。

stem: Several boys ___ (rescue) one by one before dawn.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动语态。boys 为受动者，应填 were rescued。

stem: The minister ___ the wrong word in his speech.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。演讲中的口误是过去事件，应选 used。

stem: His office said that it ___ only a slip of the tongue.
explanation: 考点:间接引语。主句 said 为过去，转述“此前发生”的解释常用 had been。

stem: Reporters ___ his line down immediately.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。新闻现场已发生的动作，用 wrote。

stem: He told reporters that he ___ lower taxes.
explanation: 考点:间接引语时态后移。主句 told 为过去，转述内容应用 supported。

stem: The host said that the minister ___ (clarify) his words later.
explanation: 考点:间接引语+过去完成时。clarify 先于 said 的转述语境，填 had clarified。

stem: A giant fish ___ near the coast this week.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时被动。this week + 受动者 fish，应用 has been caught。

stem: The shop ___ hundreds of meals today.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。today 与“到目前为止”语境搭配，应用 has sold。

stem: The fish ___ into small portions already.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时被动。already 提示结果已完成，且 fish 为受动者，选 has been cut。

stem: Many customers ___ from nearby towns.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。强调到现在已有许多顾客到来，应用 have come。

stem: Some of the fish ___ (freeze) for later use.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时被动语态。部分鱼肉“已被冷冻”，应填 has been frozen。

stem: The balloon floated ___ London in the morning.
explanation: 考点:介词。over London 表示“在伦敦上空”，符合语境。

stem: They ___ a man for directions from the sky.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。一次飞行中的已完成动作，用 asked。

stem: The basket moved ___ two tall buildings.
explanation: 考点:介词。between 用于“两者之间”，与 two tall buildings 搭配正确。

stem: The balloon ___ safely before sunset.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。before sunset 位于过去叙事，应用 landed。

stem: People ___ (below) waved to them from the street.
explanation: 考点:介词/副词。below 表示“在下方”，与 from the street 呼应。

stem: He ___ as a student policeman this term.
explanation: 考点:现在完成进行时。this term 表示从过去持续到现在，应用 has been working。

stem: He ___ a ticket for illegal parking.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。强调“已收到罚单”这一结果，选 has received。

stem: They ___ parked cars all afternoon.
explanation: 考点:现在完成进行时。all afternoon 强调持续过程，应选 have been checking。

stem: He ___ from this mistake already.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。already 提示结果，应用 has learned。

stem: He ___ (patrol) the same street since 8 a.m.
explanation: 考点:现在完成进行时。since 8 a.m. 表示持续到现在，填 has been patrolling。

stem: The Statue of Liberty ___ to the U.S. by France.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动。statue 为受动者，历史事件用 was given。

stem: People ___ near the harbor for the ceremony.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。典礼当天的动作发生在过去，应用 gathered。

stem: Each section of the statue ___ in wooden boxes.
explanation: 考点:被动语态。section 是被装箱对象，过去时用 was packed。

stem: The parts ___ in New York after shipment.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动。parts 为复数受动者，应用 were assembled。

stem: The statue ___ (ship) across the Atlantic in sections.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动语态。雕像“被运输”，应填 was shipped。

stem: The children ___ hard since early morning.
explanation: 考点:现在完成进行时。since early morning 强调持续训练过程。

stem: Their team ___ two medals so far.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。so far 提示到目前为止的结果，选 has won。

stem: She ___ on her landing technique for months.
explanation: 考点:现在完成进行时。for months 突出长期过程，应选 has been working。

stem: The coach ___ their progress this season.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。this season 内已发生并与现在相关，应用 has praised。

stem: They ___ (practice) balance every day this month.
explanation: 考点:现在完成进行时。this month + every day 强调持续训练，填 have been practicing。

stem: The dentist ___ up suddenly before dawn.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。梦后惊醒是过去动作，应选 woke。

stem: If he slept earlier, he ___ feel better.
explanation: 考点:条件句。if + 一般过去时，对应主句 would + 动词原形。

stem: He ___ his wife about the weird dream.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。叙述已结束动作，应用 told。

stem: If I were him, I ___ a holiday.
explanation: 考点:条件句。虚拟条件句主句用 would + 动词原形，故选 would take。

stem: He ___ (run) beside bulls in his dream last night.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。last night 为明确过去时间，应填 ran。

stem: Several people ___ strange lights near the cemetery.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。故事发生在一晚内，已结束动作用 saw。

stem: People had better ___ calm in such situations.
explanation: 考点:had better。其后接动词原形，不接 to，故选 stay。

stem: Police ___ the area and found no danger.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。checked 与 found 并列，保持过去时一致。

stem: Organizers had better ___ scary props early.
explanation: 考点:had better。固定结构 had better + 动词原形，选 remove。

stem: They ___ (report) the strange shadows to the police at once.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。at once 发生在过去事件链中，应填 reported。
